name: Lorton VA, USA

rent.notes: Newer townhome developments (Laurel Hill, Lorton Station). Southern Fairfax County.

groceries.notes: Wegmans, Giant, Harris Teeter. Similar to Fairfax pricing.

healthcare.notes: Fairfax County Medicare baseline. Inova Mt Vernon 10 min, Inova Fairfax 20 min.

transportation.notes: Lorton VRE (Virginia Railway Express) station (Fredericksburg line) to DC. Interstate 95 + Fairfax County Pkwy access. Longer DC commute than Fairfax City.

entertainment.notes: Workhouse Arts Center (former prison), Occoquan Regional Park. Cable+1Gig.

miscellaneous.notes: HOA (homeowners association) common in Laurel Hill subdivisions. Interstate 95 Express Lanes tolls.

medicalOOP.notes: Same retiree profile. Specialists at Inova Fairfax + Johns Hopkins.

taxes.notes: Income tax computed from VA brackets.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Fairfax County, VA). Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: Age 65+ deduction $12K/person. SS fully exempt from VA tax.

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. Fairfax County vehicle tax ~$4.57/$100.

taxes.notes: Same Fairfax County tax as Fairfax City.

healthcare.notes: Inova Mount Vernon Hospital 10 min (community hospital), Inova Fairfax 20 min for specialty.

acaMarketplace.notes: Northern Virginia (NOVA) marketplace same as Fairfax.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Occoquan River access, Workhouse Arts Center, Laurel Hill Golf Club. Quieter than inner Northern Virginia; suburban family feel.

pros: Same Fairfax County tax benefits (Social Security exempt, 65+ deduction)
VRE (Virginia Railway Express) commuter rail to DC available
cons: Fewer dining/shopping options than Fairfax City
Some neighborhoods have heavy HOAs (homeowners associations)
